title: Colony Flow Level 1
description: Watch the Colony Flow Level 1 walkthrough and learn the best order to send worker ants, match cube colors, open colony slots, and clear the puzzle board.
videoTitle: Colony Flow Level 1 Gameplay Walkthrough Solution

guide.title: Colony Flow Level 1 Walkthrough
steps: Study the cube stacks, color holes, and available colony slots before making the first move.
Send worker ants from the stack that can immediately deliver cubes to a matching color hole.
Keep at least one colony slot open so the trail does not become blocked by the wrong color.
Use the video route to copy the safest order and finish Colony Flow Level 1 without wasting moves.

tips: Plan two or three ant moves ahead before tapping a cube stack.
Clear colors with fewer cubes first when space is limited.
Avoid filling colony slots with colors that have no open matching hole.
Pause the walkthrough at each major board change if the puzzle feels crowded.

guide.title: Colony Flow Level 112 Walkthrough
steps: Study the cube stacks, color holes, and available colony slots before making the first move.
Send worker ants from the stack that can immediately deliver cubes to a matching color hole.
Keep at least one colony slot open so the trail does not become blocked by the wrong color.
Use the video route to copy the safest order and finish Colony Flow Level 112 without wasting moves.

tips: Plan two or three ant moves ahead before tapping a cube stack.
Clear colors with fewer cubes first when space is limited.
Avoid filling colony slots with colors that have no open matching hole.
Pause the walkthrough at each major board change if the puzzle feels crowded.
